sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ أَحْمَدُ عَنْ مِفْتَاحِهِ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed looked for his key everywhere.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ فِي الْجَيْبِ وَعَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ وَلَمْ يَجِدْهُ.
sentences.translation: Pogledao je u džep i na sto, ali ga nije pronašao.
sentences.translationEn: He looked in his pocket and on the table but did not find it.

sentences.translation: Pitao je svoju sestru je li ga vidjela.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his sister if she had seen it.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُخْتُ: رَأَيْتُ قِطَّتَنَا تَلْعَبُ بِشَيْءٍ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Sestra je rekla: Vidjela sam našu mačku kako se juče igrala s nečim.
sentences.translationEn: The sister said: I saw our cat playing with something yesterday.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ أَحْمَدُ الْمِفْتَاحَ تَحْتَ سَرِيرِ الْقِطَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je pronašao ključ ispod mačkinog kreveta.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed found the key under the cat's bed.
